program_en: B.A. (Chinese Language Studies) and B.Ed. (Chinese Language Education)
program_chi: 文學士（中國語文研究）及教育學士（中國語文教育）
learning_outcomes:
CLEDN_Learning Outcomes_ENG 1.  |  Major Programme:
Graduates from the programme will:
(1)  |  Demonstrate a mastery of the Chinese language and literature to a
level that meets the expectations for quality teaching in schools;
(2)  |  Attain an advanced level of proficiency in both Cantonese and
Putonghua expression for the purpose of effective teaching of the Chinese
language;
(3)  |  Develop knowledge and skills relating to Chinese language teaching;
(4)  |  Develop practical skills in material design and adaptation, in the
use of textbooks and other resources, in the assessment of language ability,
and in curriculum design and evaluation.

2000 and above level as included in the Major Programme Requirement will
be included in the calculation of Major GPA for honours classification.
[a]  |  Students whose first language is
Putonghua and who have passed a recognized Putonghua proficiency test can
be exempted from CLED2530 and/or 3530.
